decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and powerful enchantments in order to deal damage quickly and efficiently. By utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game and maintain that pressure throughout. With a focus on generating mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, the deck is designed to consistently play threats and maintain a strong board presence. The deck also includes some card draw and evasion mechanics to help push through damage and close out games swiftly.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays, utilizing cards like Badgermole Cub and Gene Pollinator to quickly build a board presence. The deck also includes control elements such as Seam Rip and Brightglass Gearhulk to disrupt opponents' strategies. The inclusion of cards like Nature's Rhythm and Meltstrider's Resolve further enhances the deck's ability to maintain pressure on opponents. With a mix of powerful creatures and versatile spells, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with speed and efficiency.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of spells and creatures that disrupt the opponent's strategy while building card advantage. By using a mix of removal, card draw, and counterspells, the deck aims to outlast opponents and secure victory through incremental advantage and tempo swings. The deck also utilizes a versatile land base to ensure consistent access to its colors and mana requirements, allowing for flexibility in its response to different threats and game situations.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy cheap, aggressive creatures and spells to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. Cards like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off help chip away at the opponent's life total while also providing utility effects. The deck also includes several counterspells like Spell Pierce to protect its threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the goal is to maintain tempo and control the pace of the game by constantly applying pressure and keeping the opponent on the back foot.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive plays using cheap spells and creatures to quickly outpace the opponent. Utilizing cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab to deal damage early on, while also having control elements with spells like Spell Pierce and Burst Lightning. With a low mana curve and card draw options like Sleight of Hand and Opt, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan. The inclusion of cards like Prismari Charm and Octopus Form provide additional versatility and finishers to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish board presence and efficiently utilize instants and sorceries to control the game tempo while dealing damage to the opponent. By utilizing low-cost spells like Burst Lightning and Opt in combination with creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain a steady stream of threats. Additionally, the inclusion of interaction spells like Spell Pierce and Prismari Charm allows for disruption against the opponent's game plan while maintaining offensive pressure.

The main focus of this deck is to efficiently control the board and deal direct damage to the opponent's life total using cheap instant spells and creatures with spells matter abilities. It aims to quickly build up a strong board presence with evasive creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and apply pressure using burn spells like Burst Lightning. The deck also includes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain tempo. This deck excels at adapting to the opponent's strategy while consistently applying pressure and maintaining card advantage.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with aggressive creatures and efficient mana ramp. By utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to accelerate their mana, the deck can play powerful threats like Badgermole Cub and Earthbender Ascension early in the game. Cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Sazh's Chocobo further increase the deck's aggression while providing ways to protect their creatures. The deck's high creature count and low mana curve allow it to consistently apply pressure and close out games before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells, utilizing a mix of bounce and burn effects to control the board while dealing direct damage. The key strategy is to establish an early board presence with cheap creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, then use counterspells and bounce spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By maintaining pressure and tempo, the deck aims to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on utilizing control elements to disrupt opponent strategies while using Izzet cards to draw cards, counter spells, and deal damage. Eddymurk Crab and Traumatic Critique are used to disrupt opponents, while Hearth Elemental and Burst Lightning provide damage output. Sleight of Hand and Opt help with card selection, while Prismari Charm offers versatility. The deck also includes Winternight Stories for card advantage and Sunderflock to control the opponent's creatures. Colorstorm Stallion and Stormcarved Coast provide additional utility in ensuring the deck's strategy is implemented effectively.

This Golgari Control deck focuses on utilizing cards that disrupt the opponent's strategy while also generating value through card advantage and removal spells. By using Professor Dellian Fel and Emeritus of Abundance to control the board, as well as cards like Requiting Hex and Witherbloom Charm to deal with threats, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and eventually overwhelm them with powerful finishers like Tragedy Feaster and Scrapshooter. The deck also includes efficient mana ramp with Llanowar Elves and strong lands like Blooming Marsh and Overgrown Tomb to support its game plan.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to play powerful creatures such as Badgermole Cub and Icetill Explorer. Ba Sing Se and Sapling Nursery help to continuously generate tokens for constant pressure on the opponent. Earthbender Ascension boosts the strength of creatures, while Mightform Harmonizer and Archdruid's Charm provide additional combat tricks and buffs. Escape Tunnel and Esper Origins provide additional utility and protection for key creatures. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with fast mana generation and aggressive creature plays.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of control elements and powerful spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining board presence. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide early game defense, while cards like Prismari Charm and Burst Lightning offer versatile removal options. Winternight Stories and Traumatic Critique help to generate card advantage, while Sunderflock and Impractical Joke add disruption to the opponent's deck. The deck aims to control the game through tempo advantage and outvalue the opponent through efficient spell usage and strategic decision-making.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of cards that allow for graveyard recursion and powerful creature reanimation. By using cards like Restless Reef and Watery Grave to enable graveyard plays, along with Requiting Hex and Doomsday Excruciator for reanimation, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with powerful creatures like Superior Spider-Man. Additionally, the deck includes disruption elements like Duress and Bitter Triumph to control the board and push towards victory. Overall, the deck focuses on setting up and executing a powerful combo strategy revolving around reanimating key creatures.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and powerful enchantments. By utilizing cards like Ba Sing Se and Mightform Harmonizer, the strategy is to quickly build a strong board presence and deal damage quickly. Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve provide additional support for the creatures, while Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage help with mana fixing and card draw. By staying focused on playing creatures and maintaining pressure on the opponent, this Mono Green Aggro deck aims to secure victory through quick and efficient gameplay.

The main focus of this deck is to establish early board presence and ramp using cards like Llanowar Elves and Wastewood Verge, while controlling the game with removal spells like Duress and Witherbloom Charm. The deck aims to outvalue opponents by generating card advantage with cards like Emeritus of Abundance and Keen-Eyed Curator, while disrupting their game plan with cards like Requiting Hex and Maelstrom Pulse. The deck also has a slight graveyard recursion theme with cards like Bitter Triumph and Shoot the Sheriff. Overall, the strategy revolves around gaining control of the game through a combination of removal, card advantage, and disruption.
